title: Jesus House Holds Raising Altar Conference 2024 - FinancialEDGE

html:
The Redeemed Christian Church of God Jesus House Abuja is set to hold its annual Raise an Altar Conference with the theme “Yahweh”.
Raising an Altar Conference is a call to the youths and young adults all over the world to join in raising an altar for the Lord Jesus Christ.

The conference is scheduled to hold from Friday September 13 to Saturday September 14, 2024 at the Church Auditorium 5/7 Redemption Way, off Oladipo Diya Road, Behind NNPC Filling Station, Durumi District, Abuja.

Youth President, Pastor Ekenem Isichei said the conference which is in its seventh year is organised to attract more youths to the kingdom of God.

He said, “As young people, we are often faced with challenges and uncertainties that can shake our faith. But in the midst of turmoil, God is calling us to rise up and raise an altar for Him. In the Bible, an altar symbolizes a place of sacrifice, worship, and encounter with God. It is a reminder that our lives should be a living sacrifice, holy and pleasing to Him (Romans 12:1)

“In order to successfully raise an Altar for God, repentance, dedication and conservation cannot be overemphasized. As youths, we have the power to raise an altar for God that will impact our generation and beyond. Let us respond to His call, surrender our lives, and create a space for His presence. Together, we can rise up and raise an altar that will bring glory to His name”.

Minister expected at the conference include Pastor Pat Akem-Vingir, Pastor Nathaniel Bassey, Pastor Sam Oye, Pastor Chimezie Ndukwu, Pastor Ekenem Isichei and Pastor Ijeoma Isichei.

Others are Minister Tee Worship, Minister Friday Olopade, Minister Chizzy and other anointed Ministers.
